title: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]"We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!"[/sine]

You do not know this man.

options.title: Give a potion
options.requires: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

options.title: Give a relic
options.requires: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

conditions: At least one tradable Relic required
notes: During this event, your Potions become locked and cannot be removed by other means. The potion or relic offered in each choice is randomly selected from what you currently own. Trading a [gold]Potion[/gold] or 100 [gold]Gold[/gold] for a relic nets 1 [gold]Relic[/gold], but trading a [gold]Relic[/gold] nets 2 [gold]Relics[/gold] for a net gain of 1 [gold]Relic[/gold].
